title: Big Globe - Born In Chaos Compatibility
description: Big Globe - Born In Chaos Compatibility
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-born-in-chaos-compatibility)

Needs [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), A compatibility mod/datapack for [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos), makes all structures and mobs generate correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

If you can't locate a structure with /locate, I recommend using mod ([Explorer Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass))

Some screenshots:
![Clown Caravan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/341c3dcd38e46a59270e067b57763f72eac45cfb_0.webp)

![Dark Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ac9f6b274db8401d27779f1ff6dcbfdb9f4d16f_0.webp)

![Observation tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d9968e29fbf943849505cb9f9ab9dd4ed94baf2_0.webp)
